[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101111000 5
1 010100000 2
2 000111100 4
3 011111011 7
4 011111000 5
5 010111000 4
6 110101000 4
7 111101000 5

01 10 101111110 7
12 21 111111111 a
23 32 011111111 8
34 43 010111101 6
45 54 111111001 7
56 65 111111000 6
67 76 111111000 6
70 07 110100000 3

02 20 011111011 7 match 3
13 31 111111110 8
24 42 011111011 7 match 3
35 53 111111100 7
46 64 111111001 7
57 75 111101000 5 match 7
60 06 111111000 6
71 17 111111110 8

14 41 111111111 a
25 52 111111011 8
36 63 111111100 7
47 74 110111001 6
50 05 111101000 5 match 7
61 16 111111110 8
72 27 111111011 8
